title: calorophus crispatus
side_effects: Calorophus crispatus can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, nausea, and stomach pain. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may lead to headaches, dizziness, and respiratory issues. Some individuals may experience skin irritation, including redness, itching, and blistering, when handling or applying the plant's extracts. In extreme cases, improper use of Calorophus crispatus can even cause kidney damage or other organ toxicity.
